name: feature.interactive-artifacts.nodes
description: Interactive-artifacts producer node pack (ADR 0128). The `render` node emits a typed `interactive.{mermaid,chart,html,react}` artifact whose content is the raw source (mermaid text / chart spec / HTML), so it flows through the existing run-output producer (ADR 0083) and renders in the chat artifact workbench's sandboxed canvas. Pure transform — no host capability required; replay-safe (output recorded, never re-derived).
author: OpenWOP App

nodes.label: Render interactive artifact
nodes.description: Emit an interactive.{mermaid|chart|html|react} artifact for the workbench canvas. Inputs: { kind, source | chart, title? } — `source` is the raw mermaid/HTML/JSX text; `chart` is a {chartType,data,options} object. Output: a typed artifact (contentTrust: untrusted). Pure transform.
